content:
So what is the show? Elevator pitch for the show: what would the a reality TV game show be like on a recently discovered inhabitable foreign planet?

Below I will outline some of the rough ideas I already have for the project.

A host of artists/athletes are drafted and sent on a one way trip to a colony on a recently discovered inhabitable planet. Their only mission is to exist and further human culture. Imagine the devils from Paradise Lost after being cast from Heaven, nothing to do, no tv to watch, no internet; what would they do to fill their days? Once a week a couple will be chemically castrated until the end of the series where the winning couple must pro create.

PSA: these artists have not been screened, have not been tested, or vetted beyond their art. 6 males and 6 females from various sexual orientations have been chosen from a pool of a million for a one way ticket to where every detail of their life will be broadcasted to the folks back home. Each month a male and female will be castrated. At the beginning, the group is sequestered in one section of the colony, and every week a new section of the colony opens up presenting new challenges, amenities, and information regarding everyone’s history. The last two who survive will procreate. Every year (season) a new band will be sent along.
context: From document: FAU MFA Writer’s Room — chunk 4 (chunk 4/5)
